headline: Robinhood Social Beta: Is it a New Driver of Top-Line Growth?
summary: HOOD tests Social beta with verified trader profiles and live trade sharing, aiming to boost engagement and drive more in-app trading activity.

headline: Record Q4 Results And AI, Bank Charter Push Might Change The Case For Investing In IBKR
summary: Interactive Brokers Group recently reported record fourth-quarter 2025 adjusted revenue and earnings per share, underpinned by rapid growth in client accounts and total customer equity across its global electronic trading platform. An interesting takeaway is that management highlighted progress toward obtaining a U.S. National Trust Bank Charter and expanding AI-driven capabilities, developments that could meaningfully shape how the broker serves and retains its growing client base. Next,...

headline: LPL Financial's Brokerage & Advisory Assets Rise in February
summary: LPLA's total brokerage and advisory assets hit $2.43T in February, up 33% YoY, while client cash and NNAs showed mixed trends.

headline: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Shares Fell by -6% in Q4
summary: TimesSquare Capital Management, an equity investment management company, released its “U.S. Focus Growth Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The strategy returned -3.55% (gross) and -3.76% (net) in the fourth quarter compared to a -3.70% return for the Russell Midcap Growth Index. In 2025, the strategy returned 14.84% […]
